name: handoff
description: Structured handoff and handon workflows for restoring coding context across machines and sessions.

interface.longDescription: Handoff adds /handoff and /handon workflows that compress current project state into repo-local markdown files, then restore context later without relying on chat history.
defaultPrompt: Use $handoff-handon to update the current project handoff.
Use $handoff-handon to restore context from the last handoff.
